name: Bowknots
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all crust from the bread slices.
2. Spread cream of mushroom soup evenly on one side of each bread slice, taking care to cover the edges as well.
3. Roll each bread slice from one corner to the opposite corner.
4. Wrap a half bacon strip around the middle of each rolled bread.
5. Secure the roll with a toothpick.
6. Place the rolls on a cookie sheet and bake at 250 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. The bowknots will be dry and crisp, making them very delicious.
7. Bowknots can be frozen before baking. Once frozen solid, transfer them to freezer bags. They can be baked directly from frozen without needing to thaw first.
